description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a dark, cylindrical handle that appears to be made of wood or a composite material, featuring engraved or etched decorative patterns along its length. The axe head is robust and metallic, with a wide, slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard, showing signs of wear and reddish discoloration, possibly from rust or staining. The poll (back) of the axe head is flat and squared, suitable for hammering. The handle is capped with a black, rounded end for improved grip and control. The blade is securely mounted to the handle, with visible reinforcement at the joint, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting style. The overall appearance is utilitarian yet ornate, making it suitable for both practical use and display in an urban garage, workshop, or as a prop in themed environments.
description: A dark-handled, single-bladed axe with decorative engravings and a robust, slightly rusted metal head. The axe features a wide cutting edge and a secure, traditional mounting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the axe, highlighting the engraved handle and the wide, slightly rusted blade.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the blade and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the decorative handle and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the blade's attachment to the handle and the overall symmetry.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight handle made of dark wood or composite, with engraved decorative patterns and a rounded grip end.
attribute_blade_design: Single wide blade with a slightly curved edge, pronounced beard, flat poll, and visible reddish discoloration; functional and slightly ornate.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible reinforcement at the joint.
